player.description: young taiwanese man in his late twenties, slim build, plain charcoal grey t-shirt, fitted dark indigo jeans, white low-top sneakers, short tidy black hair with side part, calm focused expression, simple silver wristwatch, small canvas messenger bag strap across chest, arms relaxed at sides

test_moving_npc.description:
young taiwanese university student, plain white t-shirt, dark blue jeans,
black low-top sneakers, short tidy black hair, slim build,
neutral expression, arms relaxed at sides, no accessories, no bag

prompts.add_idle_animation:
standing in place, head held perfectly still and facing the camera-relative
forward direction the same as the body, eyes looking straight ahead,
no head turning, no looking around, no rubbernecking, gentle breathing only
— shoulders rise and fall subtly, arms remain at sides, feet planted
prompts.add_walk_animation:
walking forward in the same direction the body is facing, head locked
forward and aligned with torso, eyes fixed straight ahead in the walking
direction, no head turning, no looking sideways, no glancing around,
natural arm swing opposite to leg stride, consistent gait across all frames

prompts.add_idle_animation:
standing in place at her food stall, head held perfectly still and facing
forward in the same direction as her torso, ponytail hanging straight down
the centerline of her back, eyes looking straight ahead, no head turning,
no looking around, no rubbernecking, gentle breathing only — shoulders rise
and fall subtly, arms remain at sides, feet planted, bandana knot stays
centered at the back of her head
prompts.add_walk_animation:
walking forward in the same direction her body is facing, head locked
forward and aligned with torso, eyes fixed straight ahead in the walking
direction, ponytail swinging straight down behind her (not sideways), no
head turning, no looking sideways, no glancing around, natural arm swing
opposite to leg stride, consistent gait and posture across all frames

lin_xiaoyu.description:
young taiwanese street-food vendor woman in her twenties, long black hair
pulled into a low ponytail straight down her back, light blue cotton bandana
tied as a forehead headband (knot at back, no dangling ends), white
short-sleeved button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to elbows, navy bib apron
with two square front pockets, dark slim trousers, black canvas sneakers,
slim athletic build, neutral focused expression, small silver hoop earrings,
arms relaxed at sides, no other accessories, no bag

prompts.add_idle_animation: standing in place, head held perfectly still and facing forward in the same direction as the torso, eyes looking straight ahead, no head turning, no looking around, no rubbernecking, arms relaxed at the sides with wrists hanging naturally and motionless — no random hand or wrist movement, no finger fidgeting, gentle breathing only (shoulders rise and fall subtly), feet planted, posture consistent across all frames

test_iso_player.description: young taiwanese male protagonist in his early 20s, short black hair, casual modern clothes (white t-shirt, dark jeans), small backpack, friendly and curious expression, slim athletic build

market_concrete_tile.lower: weathered grey concrete pavement with cracks and stains from years of market use
market_concrete_tile.upper: small red square ceramic floor tiles laid in grid pattern, traditional taiwanese market walkway

courtyard_dirt_grass.lower: compacted brown earth ground with small pebbles, traditional taiwanese back courtyard
courtyard_dirt_grass.upper: patchy green grass with small wildflowers and weeds

street_asphalt_sidewalk.lower: worn dark grey asphalt road surface with faded white line markings
street_asphalt_sidewalk.upper: light grey concrete sidewalk slab with expansion joint lines

test_well.description: stone water well with wooden roof, mossy bricks

family_photo_blacked.description: framed sepia-toned taiwanese family photograph from the 1970s, wooden frame slightly weathered, six figures arranged in two rows, one face on the back row completely blacked out with dark ink, glass slightly dusty

incense_burner_brass.description: small round brass incense burner with three short legs, traditional taiwanese ancestral worship style, three thin red incense sticks standing in grey ash, faint wisp of smoke

medicine_cabinet_dusty.description: tall traditional chinese pharmacy wooden herb cabinet with many small square drawers, dark stained wood faded by time, thick layer of grey dust on every surface, cobwebs in corners, brass drawer handles tarnished and dull, abandoned forty years

medicine_cabinet_new.description: tall traditional chinese pharmacy wooden herb cabinet with many small square drawers, polished dark stained wood with warm sheen, brass drawer handles bright and clean, handwritten paper labels neatly pasted on each drawer, well-kept operational shop fixture

shop_counter_wood.description: long wooden chinese pharmacy counter with worn smooth surface, dark stained wood, small brass weighing scale on top, abacus on side, paper prescription pad and ink brush stand, traditional taiwanese shop style

old_map_paper.description: old folded paper map of muzha market area yellowed with age, hand-drawn lines and small red dots marking locations, brush-written chinese characters on the back, edges slightly frayed, mysterious aged artifact

cathay_calendar_1983.description: traditional taiwanese wall calendar from 1983 with cathay life insurance branding at top, large red year numbers, monthly grid with lunar dates, small colour photograph in upper portion, paper slightly faded

lantern_paper_red.description: traditional taiwanese round red paper lantern with gold tassel hanging below, simple bamboo frame, soft warm glow from within, suspended from wooden beam

vegetable_stall.description: traditional taiwanese open-air market vegetable stall, wooden plank counter on trestles, woven bamboo baskets piled with leafy greens cabbage and root vegetables, hand-written paper price tags, simple canvas awning above in faded green

market_basket_produce.description: woven bamboo market basket filled with assorted taiwanese produce, sweet potatoes scallions and bok choy spilling out, well-used worn rim

wooden_stool_old.description: small low wooden taiwanese market stool, dark stained wood worn smooth, four simple legs, the kind elders sit on to chat at market entrances

id_card_old.description: old taiwanese paper identification card from the early 1980s, yellowed white background, small black-and-white portrait photo, handwritten chinese name field, official red seal, slightly creased from years in wallet

notebook_leather.description: small worn dark brown leather pocket notebook, cover slightly cracked, elastic band closure, yellowed pages peeking, the kind a young man would keep private thoughts in

fountain_pen_old.description: old black resin fountain pen with tarnished silver clip, slightly scratched, cap on, classic late-1970s taiwanese style

photograph_old.description: small unframed black-and-white photograph from the 1970s, slightly curled at corners, faded greyscale tones, portrait of a young man not visible from this angle

iron_gate_rusted.description: old vertical roller iron security gate of a taiwanese shopfront, painted dark green with heavy rust streaks, large brass padlock and chain at bottom, faded chinese signboard above partially visible, abandoned for decades

pharmacy_rongchang_modern.description: traditional taiwanese two-story shophouse in deep market alley, lower floor sealed by rusted dark green roller iron gate with heavy chain padlock, weathered white plastered upper floor with peeling paint, dark grey tile roof with moss patches, faded chinese signboard reading rongchang chinese medicine almost illegible, abandoned forty years

pharmacy_rongchang_1983.description: traditional taiwanese two-story shophouse in busy market alley, open shopfront with raised wooden roll-up shutter showing pharmacy interior, polished red brick lower floor, freshly painted white upper floor with wooden window shutters, dark grey tile roof in good condition, bright red chinese signboard with gold characters reading rongchang chinese medicine, red paper lanterns hanging at entrance

old_apartment_muzha.description: post-war four-story taiwanese walk-up apartment building, weathered exposed concrete facade with faded yellow paint, small balconies with rusty iron railings and hanging laundry, window-mounted air conditioner units, narrow side stairway, ground-floor metal door with small mailbox cluster

law_office_muzha.description: modest taiwanese street-level law office in an older concrete building, large window with frosted lower half and gold chinese characters reading law office, dark wooden entry door with brass handle, small plant pot beside entrance, faded vertical signboard on wall

market_shophouse_minnan.description: traditional taiwanese minnan two-story shophouse, red brick lower floor with arched doorway and wooden roll-up shutter, white plastered upper floor with wooden window shutters, dark grey tile roof with curved eaves, weathered wooden signboard, small balcony with iron railing

market_shophouse_concrete.description: post-war taiwanese two-story concrete shophouse, light grey exposed concrete facade slightly weathered, metal roll-up shutter on ground floor, simple rectangular windows on upper floor with aluminum frames, flat concrete roof with utility pipes, faded plastic signboard

test_pharmacy_iso.description: traditional taiwanese two-story shophouse, rusted iron gate, weathered upper floor, mossy tile roof, faded chinese signboard "rongchang", abandoned forty years
test_pharmacy_iso.note: Test render of pharmacy_rongchang_modern via /v2/create-image-pixflux with isometric=true. Compare against art_source/objects/pharmacy_rongchang_modern/pharmacy_rongchang_modern.png (which used /v2/map-objects + view=high_top_down → elevation only).
